description_long: This is an electric guitar with a classic double-cutaway body finished in a natural wood tone on the front and a deep red on the back and sides. The body features a black pickguard, three single-coil pickups, and a set of control knobs and a switch, typical of Stratocaster-style guitars. The neck is a lighter wood with a rosewood or similar dark fingerboard, marked with dot inlays. The headstock is black, with six inline tuning pegs and a pointed contour, and the guitar is supported by a black stand. A purple guitar strap is attached, draping down to the floor. The overall appearance is sleek and modern, with a combination of glossy and matte finishes.
description: A natural wood and red electric guitar with a black pickguard, three pickups, and a purple strap, displayed on a black stand. The design is sleek and modern, with a pointed headstock and visible control knobs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the natural wood body, black pickguard, pickups, control knobs, and the purple strap draped over the stand.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the guitar's slim profile, the thickness of the body, and the angle of the neck and headstock.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the deep red finish on the back of the body and neck, as well as the attachment points for the strap.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the contour of the body, the stand's support, and the strap hanging down.
attribute_headstock_design: Black, pointed headstock with six inline tuning pegs and no visible logo
